summary: Completed testing of bug fixes for Forgot Password flow and Chat message with image+text. All features working correctly.

issues: Firebase service worker 404 error (firebase-messaging-sw.js not found) - non-blocking but should be fixed

action_items: Add firebase-messaging-sw.js to public folder to fix service worker 404 error (optional, non-blocking)
critical_code_review_comments: ChatInput.js uses textarea instead of input - this is fine but ChatTab.js still has an input element that may cause confusion
Consider adding data-testid attributes to chat input and send button for easier testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working. Password was temporarily changed during testing but reset back to admin123. Backend tests cover: login flow, direct password reset with correct/wrong credentials, messages with text_content for images, reply messages. Frontend tests cover: forgot password modal, form validation, login with new password, chat message sending.

details: Modal opens with Username, Email, New Password, Confirm Password fields
Form submission with correct credentials shows success message
Wrong email shows error: 'Email does not match the account on file'
Login with new password works after reset
POST /api/users/reset-password-direct with correct credentials returns success
POST /api/users/reset-password-direct with wrong email returns 400 error
Text messages send and display correctly
Image messages with text_content field accepted and stored
Reply messages work with reply_to_id and reply_to data
UI chat input (textarea) works for sending messages
